name: Enterprise
description:
Built for organizations that scale — securely and globally.

  • Dedicated account manager

  • SSO and advanced permissions

  • SLA-backed uptime guarantee

  • Custom integrations and onboarding

name: Pro
description:
For teams who need performance, flexibility, and growth tools.

  • Unlimited projects

  • Priority email and chat support

  • Team collaboration and roles

  • Advanced reporting and insights

  • API access with higher rate limits

name: Starter
description:
Get started with all the essentials — simple, fast, and scalable.

  • Access to all core features

  • Up to 3 projects or clients

  • Email support within 24 hours

  • Basic analytics dashboard

  • 1 team member included
